about.title: Welcome to Glowsmetics
about.subtitle: Professional skincare with Korean cosmetics
about.description: I believe every skin type is unique and deserves individual care. My goal is to create a place where you will feel comfortable, relax, and leave not only with healthy and fresh-looking skin but also beautifully styled brows and lashes.

hydration_facial.title: Hydration facial
hydration_facial.description: Intensively hydrating cosmetic treatment with professional Korean cosmetics. Suitable for dehydrated, tired, or dull skin, restoring necessary hydration, softness, and natural glow. The products used and individual steps of the treatment are always adapted to the current state and needs of the skin.
pre_care: If possible, come without makeup (not a requirement).
Do not use retinol, retinal, or exfoliating acids (AHA/BHA) 3-5 days prior if you have sensitive skin.
Inform me about any allergies, medications, or dermatological treatments.
post_care: Avoid sauna, steam, pool, and intense sports for 24 hours.
Do not use retinoids or exfoliating acids for the first 24 hours.
Use hydrating care and SPF 30-50.
Provide your skin with plenty of hydration.
contraindications: Recent chemical peel or laser treatment
Recent botox or fillers (recommended interval as per doctor)

calm_restore_facial.title: Calm & Restore Facial
calm_restore_facial.description: Gentle cosmetic treatment with Korean cosmetics designed for sensitive, irritated, or reddened skin. It focuses on restoring the skin barrier, intensive soothing, and deep hydration. Ideal also for skin prone to sensitivity or after demanding home care. The products used and individual steps of the treatment are always adapted to the current state and needs of the skin.
pre_care: If possible, come without makeup (not a requirement).
Inform me about your current skin condition and any dermatological treatments.
Do not use retinoids or strong exfoliants 3-5 days prior.
post_care: Use gentle hydrating care.
Avoid sauna, pool, and intense sun for 24 hours.
Use SPF every day.

korean_glow_facial.title: Korean glow facial
korean_glow_facial.description: Luxurious cosmetic treatment inspired by the Korean skincare philosophy. A combination of professional products, intensive hydration, and relaxing massage promotes a healthy, fresh, and naturally radiant appearance of the skin. Ideal before an important event or as regular care. The products used and individual steps of the treatment are always adapted to the current state and needs of the skin.
pre_care: If possible, come without makeup (not a requirement).
Do not use retinoids or exfoliating acids at least 3-5 days prior.
Inform me about any aesthetic procedures or dermatological treatments.
post_care: Avoid sun exposure and always use SPF.
Do not visit sauna or pool for the first 24 hours.
Do not use active ingredients (retinoids, acids) for 48 hours.
Follow the recommended home care.

brow_lamination_tint.title: Brow Lamination with Tinting
brow_lamination_tint.description: Perfectly styled and tinted brows that frame your face beautifully.
pre_care: You don't need to remove your brow makeup before the visit. It helps me see how you usually style it and what you prefer.
Do not peel around the eyebrows at least 24 hours prior.
Inform me about any allergies.
post_care: Do not wet the brows for 24 hours.
Avoid sauna, steam, pool, and intense sweating.
Do not use oil products around the brows for the first day.
Regular brow nourishment is recommended.
contraindications: Allergy to tints or used products
Eczema or dermatitis around the eyebrows

brow_lamination.title: Brow Lamination
brow_lamination.description: Long-lasting brow styling for a fuller, natural look.
pre_care: You don't need to remove your brow makeup before the visit. It helps me see how you usually style it and what you prefer.
Do not peel around the eyebrows at least 24 hours prior.
Inform me about any allergies.
post_care: Do not wet the brows for 24 hours.
Avoid sauna, steam, pool, and intense sweating.
Do not use oil products around the brows for the first day.
Regular brow nourishment is recommended.
contraindications: Eczema or dermatitis around the eyebrows

korean_lash_lift.title: Korean Lash Lift
korean_lash_lift.description: Gentle lifting and curling of your natural lashes for an open, awakened look.
pre_care: Come without mascara and eye makeup.
If you wear contact lenses, I recommend removing them before the treatment.
Inform me about eye sensitivity or allergies.
post_care: Do not wet the lashes for 24 hours.
Avoid sauna, steam, and pool.
Do not use waterproof mascara for the first day.
Do not use an eyelash curler.
For longer lasting results, regular lash nourishment is recommended.
contraindications: Inflammation of the eyes or eyelids
Recent eye surgery or laser vision correction

brow_lamination_tint_lash_lift.title: Brow Lamination with Tinting + Lash Lift
brow_lamination_tint_lash_lift.description: A complete makeover for your eyes and brows.
pre_care: If possible, come without eye makeup.
If you wear contact lenses, I recommend removing them before the treatment.
Inform me about allergies, eye sensitivity, or skin conditions.
post_care: Do not wet the lashes or brows for the first 24 hours.
Avoid steam, sauna, pool, and intense sports.
Do not use oil products around the eyes and brows for the first day.
Regular nourishment for both lashes and brows is recommended.
contraindications: All contraindications listed for both brow lamination and lash lifting apply.
